name: Chicken-Cucumber Mold
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch green onions, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a Dutch oven; cover with water and bring to a boil.
2. Add salt, pepper, bay leaves, onion, carrots, and parsley. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
3. Remove chicken; let cool. Bone the chicken and chop the meat.
4. Place the chopped chicken in a lightly oiled 4-cup ring mold. Set aside.
5. Strain the broth and refrigerate it.
6. Skim and discard any fat from the cold broth.
7. In a small saucepan, combine 1/4 cup of broth and gelatin. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve the gelatin.
8. Add an additional 1 1/2 cups of broth, mixing well. Pour this gelatin mixture over the chicken.
9. Chill overnight in the mold.
10. Unmold on a serving plate.
11. Place cucumber slices overlapping on top of the mold.
12. Serve with sauce and crackers.
13. Yield: about 24 servings
14. Sauce: Combine mayonnaise, tarragon, and lemon juice in a small mixing bowl; stir well (Yield: 1/2 cup).
